description: Reused verbatim from src/features/knowledge-engine's own closed vocabulary for this domain. Source of truth: src/features/knowledge-engine/types/vocabularies.ts → MARKETING_CHANNEL_KEYS. Note: business-library/schema.ts's own marketingStrategy.channels[].channelType (legacy format) is freeform — this taxonomy is the closed vocabulary the new format should validate channel choices against instead.
